name: Baked Pork Chops2
recipeInstructions:
1. Use only Hungarian mild Paprika. It is available at most larger stores and specialty shops.
2. Place the pork chops in an ovenproof casserole dish.
3. Mix the remaining ingredients, except sour cream, and pour over the chops.
4. Marinate the chops 2 to 3 hours in the refrigerator.
5. Bake the chops, uncovered, in a preheated 325°F oven for 1 hour or until tender.
6. Add more wine if necessary.
7. Stir sour cream into pan juices and heat through but do not boil.
8. Serve chops with sour-cream gravy and buttered noodles or dumplings.
